(def merged-prs (filter #(and (= (:state %) "merged") (:closes_linear %))
                         (github_pull_requests)))

(def linear-ids (vec (distinct (map :closes_linear merged-prs))))

(def li (linear_issues {:id linear-ids}))

(def not-done-ids (set (map :id (filter #(not= (:state %) "done") li))))
